a_avoid:
• Cost and schedule overruns, defects, a failing contractor
  • Regulatory mistakes (permit, off-plan sales, co-ownership, guarantees)
a_meta: Duration: the whole operation (18–30 months)Fees ≈ under 8% of the secured margin
a_punit: of the operation cost (sliding scale) · from 150,000 MAD (excl. tax) · quoted on estimate
a_recv:
• Steering the 7 steps — from land to close-out, and every deliverable of each step
  • Site supervision — contractor selection, quality / cost / schedule control (construction expertise)
  • Regular reporting — you always know where your project and budget stand
a_who: You want support from A to Z, without managing anything alone. We steer the whole operation by your side.
amo_h: Project assistance — how far do you want support?
amo_p: Five levels, depending on how far you want support. Levels 1-2 are flat-fee; beyond that, fees as a % of the operation cost, quoted on estimate by scope.
c_meta: Ideal to test our method before full support
c_punit: per day, or flat fee · excl. tax
c_recv:
• Standalone land audit of a specific plot
  • Developer budget / feasibility study of an operation
  • Contract review (preliminary agreement, off-plan, partners' pact)
  • Selecting and vetting a works contractor
c_who: You only need a specific expertise, without full support.
cible1_p: The money and ambition to become a developer, but not the experience of land and construction. We turn your budget into a controlled project, without you being trapped.
cible2_p: Land whose full value you don't know how to unlock. We assess its potential and build the operation that maximises its value.
cible3_p: Family or partners already gathered around a project. We properly structure your partnership and professionalise the setup.
cible_p: Whether you have capital, land or partners, the common thread is the same: a high-potential project, and the need to be secured.
conf1_p: The sector's number-one trap, handled at the source (land registry, urban agency, surveyor).
conf2_p: Notaries, architects, surveyors, engineering offices, contractors — selected and monitored.
conf3_p: You know exactly where every dirham goes, from land to delivery.
conf4_p: We bill you, never the seller. No hidden commission, no conflict of interest.
conf_p: What sets us apart from improvised 'advisers': a method, proof, and total independence.
contact_p: A plot in mind, a doubt, an operation to launch? Let's talk. The first contact is without commitment.
d_avoid:
• Buying booby-trapped land (fake title, joint ownership, non-buildable…)
  • Launching an operation that isn't profitable
d_info: Architect's sketch included: we have a sketch produced that fixes the truly buildable program (areas, number of units). Your feasibility budget is therefore costed on precise bases — not a mere estimate.
d_meta: Duration: a few daysBonus: amount deducted if you continue to Setup or full assistance
d_punit: indicative · by project size · excl. tax
d_recv:
• Land risk report — the 29 points verified at the source (land registry, urban agency, surveyor), verdict 🟢/🟠/🔴
  • Architect's sketch — the buildable program (areas, number of units)
  • Costed developer budget — costs, revenue, margin and cash flow, on precise bases
  • Written go / no-go recommendation — a clear, argued decision
d_who: You're hesitating to start, or you have a plot in mind and a doubt. We verify before you commit a single dirham.
etapes_p: You bring your land and your project. We handle the rest — from verification to delivery.
foot_bl: The advice that secures your real-estate projects — from land to delivery.
foot_legal: © 2026 Aman Conseil — أمان. Advisory and project-owner assistance in real-estate development. The firm carries out no fundraising or financial intermediation. Best-efforts commitment, no guarantee of results. Demo mockup — details and links to be completed.
hero_h1: Secure your real-estate project. Avoid the scams.
hero_money: You have the capital and the ambition to become a developer, but not the experience? We put our dual expertise — real estate and construction — at the service of your project, so you invest without being trapped.
hero_sub: Want to get into real-estate development but the land side scares you? Aman Conseil verifies, structures and steers your project from A to Z — and protects you from the sector's costliest traps.
lead_consent: By continuing, you agree to be contacted by Aman Conseil about your project. Data processed under law 09-08 (CNDP).
lead_sub: Your details to discover your detailed verdict and our recommendations.
m_avoid:
• Conflicts between partners and unforeseen deadlocks
  • A shaky bank file that sinks the loan
m_meta: Duration: a few weeksNotary / lawyer coordination (their fees extra)
m_recv:
• Dedicated project company — draft articles (LLC/SA), share split by contribution
  • Partners' agreement — governance, profit distribution, exit / pre-emption / lock-up clauses
  • Bank financing file — ready to present to the bank (budget, guarantees, cash-flow plan)
m_who: Your project is validated (green light from the Diagnosis) and you want to structure it properly before raising financing.
n1_inc:
• Securing the land
  • Feasibility & developer budget (sketch included)
  • Go / no-go recommendation
n2_inc:
• Everything in Level 1
  • Project company & partners' agreement
  • Bank financing file
o_note: Indicative prices, excl. tax (20% VAT added). Disbursements (notary, surveyor, land-registry fees, urban agency, geotechnical study…) are billed separately, at actual cost. The exact assistance fee is set in the quote, after a first discussion about your project. Commitment: best efforts, not a guarantee of results.
o_p: A journey, not a catalogue. The Diagnosis is the entry point — its cost is deducted if you continue.
pd_introsub: An instant verdict on the risk level, and the points to secure first.
pd_p: 10 questions, 2 minutes. Assess your land's risk before committing — and get our recommendations.
prest_benefits:
• ✓Business referrals — serious clients, already qualified and supported.
  • ✓"Verified project" label — your work backed by our method.
  • ✓Lasting relationship — recurring projects, not one-shot.
prest_consent: Your data is processed to assess your application, under law 09-08 (CNDP).
prest_h2: Join our network of vetted providers
prest_msg_ph: Your references, your area of operation…
prest_ok_p: We'll review your profile and get back to you soon.
prest_p: Notaries, architects, surveyors, engineering offices, construction firms… We work with serious, vetted partners. Introduce yourself and we'll get back to you.
prest_why: Why join the Aman Conseil network:
prob1_p: Fake titles, fake powers of attorney, non-buildable land, unsettled joint ownership, hidden mortgage. Most fraud is concentrated here.
prob2_p: Underestimating costs, overestimating sale prices, ignoring cash flow: the margin vanishes before the first shovel.
prob3_p: Permits, off-plan sales, co-ownership, guarantees, project company… A path reserved for insiders, where every mistake is costly.
prob_h2: Development pays. The land can destroy everything.
prob_p: The margins attract many — but the sector is riddled with scams and complexity. Without a method, a project owner moves forward blind.
recos_none: No critical point detected. Still confirm with a professional verification.
res_disc: This pre-diagnosis is indicative and replaces neither a professional verification nor a notary's involvement.
res_up_d: The Diagnosis Pack verifies each point at the source and gives you a defensible report. The first step toward a project with no nasty surprises.
st2_p: Costs, revenue, margin, cash flow. Go / no-go decision.
st3_p: Project company, partners' agreement, bank file.
st4_p: Architect, engineering office, file and permit follow-up.
st5_p: Tender, works contract, quality / cost / schedule control.
st8_p: Every dirham tracked, every risk flagged.
tier1_inc:
• Everything in Level 2
  • Design & permit file
  • Obtaining the building permit
tier2_inc:
• Everything in Level 3
  • Tender & contractor selection
  • Works contract & site supervision
  • Acceptance of the works
tier3_inc:
• Everything in Level 4
  • Pricing strategy & sales
  • Off-plan (VEFA) contracts (law 44-00)
  • Delivery, co-ownership, guarantees & close-out
tier3_price: 2.5 – 4% of the operation cost · from 150,000 MAD

v_green_msg: The key points appear to be in place. A full verification is still recommended before signing.
v_orange_msg: Several points must be verified before you commit.
v_red_msg: At least one blocking point is missing. Don't buy without thorough verification.
vcard_green: Good sign — key points are in place
vcard_red: High risk — don't buy as is
